hero.subtitle: A B2B platform that transforms 3D models into shareable VR experiences — accelerate your pipeline, impress stakeholders, and close deals with confidence.

items.title: Immersive VR Walkthroughs
items.body: Let clients walk through properties and designs before they're built — full presence, full scale.

items.title: Link-Based Sharing
items.body: Share a link, open a world. No downloads, no friction — clients explore in one click.

items.title: 3D Format Support
items.body: We work with .FBX, .OBJ, .glTF, Revit, and SketchUp files — bring your workflow as-is.

items.title: Sales Presentations
items.body: Turn walkthroughs into closing tools — annotate, compare finishes, and get real-time approvals.

items.title: AR Preview
items.body: Preview furniture and spaces in augmented reality on any smartphone.

items.title: Multi-User Sessions
items.body: Guide clients through spaces together — collaborate remotely in real-time VR.

workflow.title: Built for your workflow
workflow.subtitle: See how STEP IN APP adapts to the professionals who need it most.

audiences.heading: Interior Designers
audiences.body: Present material palettes, lighting scenarios, and spatial layouts in full-scale VR. Let clients feel the space before a single swatch is ordered — iterate faster, align expectations, and deliver with confidence.
audiences.image_alt: Interior designer working with a client in a VR environment

audiences.heading: Architects
audiences.body: Communicate massing, spatial flow, and design intent with unmatched clarity. Walk stakeholders through your vision at 1:1 scale — accelerate approvals and reduce costly revisions.
audiences.image_alt: Architect presenting a building walkthrough in VR

audiences.heading: Real Estate Brokers
audiences.body: Sell properties before they're built. Give remote buyers immersive tours, showcase off-plan developments, and stand out in competitive markets with presentations that close.
audiences.image_alt: Real estate broker showing a VR property tour to clients

what_is_stepin.title: What is STEPIN?
what_is_stepin.description: We specialise in cloud-based VR that transforms your 3D models into immersive, shareable walkthroughs — accessible anywhere. Present, annotate, and get approvals in real-time collaborative sessions, accelerating sales cycles with spatial experiences that build confidence and close deals.

cards.title: Purpose-Built
cards.body: A cloud-based VR platform for real estate, architecture, and interior design professionals.

cards.title: Models by You
cards.body: Upload your 3D models — we turn them into shareable, immersive walkthroughs.

cards.title: Explore in Virtual
cards.body: Clients explore projects in VR, AR, or any web browser — no app install required.

footer.tagline: Premium VR experiences for real estate, design, and retail. Step into the future.

how_it_works.title: How it Works
how_it_works.subtitle: From arrival to immersion, we ensure a seamless transition from the physical to the virtual realm.

steps.title: Upload
steps.body: Submit your 3D files and project brief through our platform.

steps.title: We Optimize
steps.body: Our team prepares and optimizes your scene for peak visual fidelity.

steps.title: Clients Explore
steps.body: Share the link — clients explore in VR, AR, or web browser.

contact_cta.title: Ready to step in your next project?
contact_cta.subtitle: Book an immersive walkthrough session for your team or clients today. Experience the power of spatial design firsthand.
contact_cta.modal_subtitle: Leave your details and we'll get back to you.
contact_cta.success_message: Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.
